user_query: How do I reset my password?
ideal_answer: Go to the login page, click Forgot Password, and follow the email link to create a new password.

user_query: Can I change the email address on my account?
ideal_answer: Yes. Open Settings, go to Account, and update your email address. You may need to confirm the new email before it becomes active.

ideal_answer: Open Workspace Settings, select Team Members, and send invites using their email addresses. Invited users will receive a join link.

user_query: What happens if I reach my plan limit?
ideal_answer: When you hit a plan limit, TaskFlow will stop allowing new usage for that limit until you upgrade or free up capacity.

user_query: what happens if i reach my plan limit?
ideal_answer: When you hit a plan limit, TaskFlow will stop allowing new usage for that limit until you upgrade or free up capacity.

user_query: When will I be charged again?
ideal_answer: Your subscription renews on the same day each billing cycle. You can see the next charge date in the Billing section.

ideal_answer: Your subscription renews on the same day each billing cycle. You can see the next charge date in the Billing section.

user_query: What is the difference between Pro and Business plans?
ideal_answer: Pro is for small teams that need core collaboration features. Business includes advanced permissions, analytics, and higher usage limits.
